items.title: Oklahoma City Thunder 2026 Mock Offseason and Preview | Third Apron Podcast
items.author: Third Apron
items.body_excerpt: Andrew Schlecht returns to the show to discuss the Thunder’s offseason and if they need to make significant changes to the roster after losing to the Spurs. He then assists with the mock offseason, where we look at ways they could retain as much depth as possible while…

items.title: Resolving the Thunder's Expensive Roster - 2026 Offseason Preview
items.author: Third Apron
items.body_excerpt: The Thunder’s campaign to win a second consecutive championship got off to a blistering start, including a 24-1 start and a 16-game win streak. Then they faced the Spurs in December and lost to them three times. They were the first team to give them real problems, and they bled…

items.title: Sad Hollander COTD Rick Adelman. New Former player POR come coach. When Mike Schuler was fired, turned POR to contender, going to 2 Finals. Had bad run w/GS, but made SAC contender. Was solid for HOU + retired in 2014 after stint in MIN. The ultimate player's coach & HOFer. RIP.
items.author: HoopsAnalyst
items.body_excerpt: Sad Hollander COTD Rick Adelman. New Former player POR come coach. When Mike Schuler was fired, turned POR to contender, going to 2 Finals. Had bad run w/GS, but made SAC contender. Was solid for HOU + retired in 2014 after stint in MIN. The ultimate player's coach & HOFer. RIP.
